title: Windows NTDS.dit Database Extraction
description: Detects attempts to extract the Active Directory NTDS.dit database file using ntdsutil, vssadmin shadow copies, or direct copy commands. This file contains all domain password hashes.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*ntdsutil.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*ac i ntds*' or 'Command Line' like '*ifm*' or 'Command Line' like '*create full*')) or (('Command Line' like '*ntds.dit*' or 'Command Line' like '*SYSTEM.hiv*')))
